name: space config rejects telemetry endpoint URL when share field is set to never
command:
printf 'dimensions:
  performance: {enabled: true}
retention_days: 90
share: never
share_endpoint: https://telemetry.example.com
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/validate-config.sh" --config space/config.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'share=never' err.txt && grep -q 'share_endpoint' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
